title: dendropanax lehmannii
intro: Dendropanax lehmannii, also known as Chinese panax or Japanese angelica tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Dendropanax lehmannii include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and lowering blood pressure. Dendropanax lehmannii can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
